title: Refactor mesh_to_mesh in lichen-gateway/src/gateway.rs to use lichen_rpl::routing::SourceRoutingHeader::write_to instead of add_rpl_source_route
description: Switch from manual stack::add_rpl_source_route to the structured SourceRoutingHeader from lichen-rpl for consistency with C impl and spec. Update buffer handling and SCHC recompression after insertion.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks (lug0.2.2.1-4): imports, SRH construction, packet mod with write_to, buffer/SCHC/tests. Now an epic for consistency refactor with C impl.
